prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南师范大学在上海市综合科类最低录取位次分别为约11391→12419→13663→13763→13876名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约2485名，年均后 移约500名；2025年基准位次约13876名，近3年波动趋缓，后移幅度逐年收窄；该校在上海市招生计划2021年5人、2022年6人、2023年8人、2024年8人、2025年8 人；2026年计划增至11人，较2025年扩招37.5%，是近6年最大幅度扩招，将显著增加录取名额，按供需弹性原理使最低录取位次数字明显增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南 师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第86名、2022年第88名、2023年第87名、2024年第86名、2025年第88名、2026年第92名，近年排名略有下滑但仍 稳居全国百强，属于中上游211师范院校；2025年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院教授公开羞辱求助学生的师德师风事件，可能对报考心理产生 轻微负面影响；抖音学校热度总排名第100位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度处于中低水平，未出现明显热度助推信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估中，湖南师范大学唯一A-及以上学科为外国语言文学（A-），与该校在沪招生的外国语言文学类专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力；其余招 生专业（软件工程、生物科学、历史学、经济学）未进入A-及以上评级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（含软件工程）2024年社会热度为推荐，属偏热专业；师范/教育类为 分化观望；外语类为一般观望；金融/财经/经济类（含经济学）为分化观望。上海市2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙市，属跨省招生；该校在上海市招生占比极小（2025年仅8人，占该校全国招生总量极小比例），地 域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招37.5%使录取位次数字显著增大、上海市考生总数同比增加35.4%加剧竞争、声誉偏负面轻微 拉低报考热度等关键因素，在2025年基准13876名基础上，结合考生规模与声誉做有限修正后，预测2026年最低录取位次约17028名，区间16528–1 7528名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 软件工程
- 生物科学（师范类）
- 历史学（师范类）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 外国语言文学类（含英语、俄语、德语、法语、日语、朝鲜语、西班牙语。含世承书院锺书班）
- 经济学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约17028名，区间16528–17528名。建议位次在区间内考生以二档专业（外国语言文学类、经济学）为主力填报，一档专业（软件工程、生物科学、历史学）作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（如16500名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（17500名左右）应以二档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 11391 → 12419 → 13663 → 13763 → 13876, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2485 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 500 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13876, with fluctuations narrowing in the past 3 years and the backward shift decreasing year by year; the university's enrollment plan in Shanghai was 5 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 11, an expansion of 37.5% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in the past 6 years, which will significantly increase admission slots, causing the minimum admission ranking number to increase markedly according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 86th in 2021, 88th in 2022, 87th in 2023, 86th in 2024, 88th in 2025, and 92nd in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still firmly among the top 100 nationally, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 normal universities; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology; the university's overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 100th, rated as average, with exposure on short video platforms at a medium-low level, showing no obvious popularity boost signals; no signs of gaps or sharp drops were found in historical admission anomaly records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan Normal University's only A- or above discipline is Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), which directly corresponds to the Foreign Languages and Literature majors it recruits in Shanghai, providing some attraction for related major applications; other recruited majors (Software Engineering, Biological Sciences, History, Economics) did not achieve A- or above ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer-related (including Software Engineering) had a social popularity rating of 'recommended' in 2024, belonging to relatively popular majors; Normal/Education majors are 'differentiated and wait-and-see'; Foreign Language majors are 'generally wait-and-see'; Finance/Accounting/Economics (including Economics) are 'differentiated and wait-and-see'. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and recruits across provinces; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanghai is very small (only 8 in 2025, a very small proportion of the university's total national enrollment), so the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in admission ranking numbers due to the 37.5% expansion in 2026, the 35.4% year-on-year increase in the number of candidates in Shanghai intensifying competition, and the slight negative reputation lowering application enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 13876, with limited corrections for candidate scale and reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 17028, with a range of 16528–17528.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Software Engineering
- Biological Sciences (Normal)
- History (Normal)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including English, Russian, German, French, Japanese, Korean, Spanish; including Shicheng Academy Zhongshu Class)
- Economics
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 17028, range 16528–17528. It is recommended that candidates within the range primarily fill in Tier 2 majors (Foreign Languages and Literature, Economics) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Software Engineering, Biological Sciences, History) as reach options; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16500) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 17500) should mainly rely on Tier 2 majors as safety options.
